assertions.title: Investigation document updated with new findings

steps.action: Check analysis document for findings/conclusion headers with grep
steps.observed: Found "Definitive Finding", "Conclusions", "ROOT CAUSE FOUND", and "FIX CONFIRMED" headers.

commands: grep -nE "^## (Conclusions|ROOT CAUSE FOUND|FIX CONFIRMED|Definitive Finding)" research/debug/latency-investigation.md

steps.action: Evaluate hypothesis verdict coverage for H1-H7 plus hidden API calls
steps.expected: At least 6 of 8 hypotheses have explicit confirmed/refuted/inconclusive verdicts
steps.observed: Coverage check found explicit verdicts for 8/8 required hypotheses.

commands: python3 hypothesis coverage parser over research/debug/latency-investigation.md

steps.action: Search for explicit root-cause statements and remediation/next-step guidance
steps.expected: Root cause identified or narrowed to <=2 candidates with next step
steps.observed: Document contains explicit root-cause statements (e.g., "secondary API calls timing out") and recommended fix/next-step sections.

commands: grep -nEi "^### Root Cause|root cause is|primary root cause" research/debug/latency-investigation.md

steps.action: Check conclusions/findings for concrete numeric/timestamped evidence and trace artifacts
steps.expected: References include concrete data (timestamps, step timing, network capture, strace)
steps.observed: Document includes step-level timestamps/token data, tcpdump packet counts, and strace epoll/network socket findings.

assertions.title: Network capture data informed analysis conclusions

steps.action: Inspect conclusions for explicit network-capture findings
steps.expected: Conclusions reference packet/request/timing findings from capture
steps.observed: Conclusions cite tcpdump capture totals (3883 packets) and packet-rate/burst observations tied to gap periods.

steps.expected: Conclusions reference strace/syscall findings in final reasoning
steps.observed: Conclusions explicitly use strace evidence (epoll_wait blocking and parallel TLS socket activity) to support root cause.

assertions.title: All produced artifacts are committed or documented

steps.action: Check git status for mission-related paths and untracked artifacts
steps.expected: No key untracked mission artifacts, or explicit ephemeral-artifact documentation
steps.observed: git status shows untracked key artifact configs/models/local-sonnet-4.6.yaml; investigation doc does not label untracked artifacts as ephemeral.

assertions.issues: Untracked mission-related model config file remains: configs/models/local-sonnet-4.6.yaml.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 6 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-004 due to untracked mission-related artifact configs/models/local-sonnet-4.6.yaml).
